raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Formal Billing Dispute Payment Misallocation Account Ending XXXX Dear Citi Customer Relations, I am writing to formally dispute a payment misallocation on my Citi Strata Elite account ending in XXXX. 

On XX/XX/year>, I made a payment of {$5000.00} with the intent to pay down new charges incurred during the XXXX billing period ( XXXX ), which included a {$3900.00} USCIS filing fee and other purchases totaling {$4500.00}. 

However, per my XX/XX/year> statement, this payment was applied to my Citi Flex Plan principal instead reducing my Flex Plan from 8 payments remaining to 3 remaining ( an acceleration of 5 payments worth approximately {$5300.00} ). As a result, my new charges of {$4500.00} remain entirely unpaid, and I am now being asked to pay {$5500.00} by XX/XX/year> despite having already sent {$5000.00} just days prior. 

I was never informed that payments made after new charges post would be applied to the Flex Plan balance rather than to those new charges. Had this been clearly communicated, I would have timed my payment differently. I am effectively being asked to pay twice for the same billing period, which is not a reasonable outcome for a customer who paid early and in good faith. 

I am requesting the following resolution : 1. A full credit of {$5000.00} to my account to correct the misallocation, OR a reallocation of my {$5000.00} payment to cover my new statement charges of {$4500.00}, with the remainder applied as intended. 
XXXX. Confirmation that no late fees or interest will accrue while this dispute is under review. 
XXXX. A written response detailing how my payment was allocated and the steps taken to resolve this. 

I have retained copies of my XXXX and XXXX statements, as well as chat transcripts with your support team documenting multiple attempts to resolve this issue, as supporting documentation. 

Please treat this as a formal billing dispute under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ). I expect a written response within the 30-day statutory period. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX Account Ending : XXXX
